hooks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Push-Location 'c:\willvi RPA\HQ_Branch_Automation\hq-inventory'; git add -A; $s = git status --porcelain 2>&1; if ($s) { $d = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; git commit -m "자동 저장 $d" 2>&1 | Out-Null; git push 2>&1 | Out-Null }; Pop-Location
